context.author: xbiedro
context.orig: ja nie grałem jak zobaczyłem wizualia to powiedziałem że nie ma opcji że będę w to grał xD
context.en: I didn't play it, when I saw the visuals I said there was no way I would play it xD
context.pt: Eu não joguei, quando vi o visual eu disse que não tinha como jogar xD

context.author: xbiedro

context.en: Generally speaking, this is probably the future of game development

context.author: lepryko

context.en: Whether this is the future, I don't know, I work every day as a soft dev, working closely with AI
